raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I purchased round-trip flights through XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XX/XX/XXXX / XXXX XX/XX/XXXX ) and was charged {$2500.00} ; the same day Booking.com emailed that the booking failed/canceled and stated a full refund would be issued if I was charged, so I bought replacement non-refundable tickets elsewhere and traveled on those. I did not learn the XXXX tickets were still active until XX/XX/XXXX, when XXXX emailed me to check in, and I discovered XXXX had issued/kept tickets anyway, resulting in duplicate tickets and charges. XXXX later issued only a partial refund of {$71.00}, leaving {$2400.00} unresolved. I contacted XXXX  multiple times and provided their cancellation email, but they denied the cancellation and did not resolve it, so I filed a billing dispute with American Express for {$2400.00}, which American Express closed/denied ( citing late filing or similar ) without crediting the remaining amount.
